title: Control -> Executable Check Map
description: Turns a control matrix from a document nobody reads into a gate input. Each binding maps a standards control (ASVS 5.0 / SSDF / API Top 10 / LLM Top 10 / CSF / CIS) to a concrete executable check and the evidence that proves it. `appsec-sdk control.matrix.verify` reads this: any binding with status:covered that lacks a resolvable evidence_ref FAILs; a high-tier control left not_assessed in a regulated gate BLOCKs. This is the wiring the audit flagged missing — control-matrix.template.yaml + 24KB crosswalk existed but fed 0 gate.

gate_level.description: Higher levels require more controls covered with evidence

check.description: Executable check id/command, e.g. authz-matrix-test / secret-scan / api-bola-negative-test / agent-prompt-injection-eval

evidence_ref.description: Path/anchor to evidence proving the check ran and passed (required when status=covered)

x-canonical-bindings.note: Reference bindings the audit named explicitly (control -> executable check):
